title: Seagrass Basket Woven Laundry Foldable Handcraft Weave Belly Basket with Handle, 45cm x 35cm, Light Brown
features: ♥ It is hand-woven from natural materials straw, so it is environmentally friendly and free from harmful substances.
♥ MULTI-PURPOSE - A versatile storage and carrying basket that makes a chic beach bag, laundry basket, toy container for kids or a reusable shopping bag.
♥ Fits in any corner, the basket takes up small space. Perfect for every corner of the house, hallway, living room, children's room, bathroom, balcony room.
♥ LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: It is very light and the handles are comfortable to carry, even with lots of east/vegetables inside.
♥ Due to the handmade, each basket is slightly different in size and detail.
description: Multi-purpose: decor, creative storage, picnic, grocery baskets, beach bag, flower pot covers, laundry, toy organiser, etc. Perfect for every corner of the house, hallway, living room, children's room, bathroom, balcony room. Specification: Material:Straw Colour: as shown in the picture. Size: 45 x 35 x 36 cm, handle: 14 x 13 cm. Note: Please allow for small errors due to manual measurement. Due to the difference between different monitors, the image may not reflect the actual colour of the item.

specifications_table.Material: ‎If the basket you received is a little green, please do not worry. You can put it in the sun for a few days or leave it for a certain period of time, the color will turn yellow
